title: phellopterus littoralis
intro: Phellopterus littoralis, also known as the Coastal Phellopterus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Phellopterus littoralis include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Phellopterus littoralis is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion for use in herbal remedies, with the root bark being the most commonly used part for medicinal purposes.
